name: muster
description: Glass-box agentic router. Exposes muster's deterministic CLI brain (capability and domain routing, gate scoring, RICE prioritization, wave planning) as MCP tools.
long_description: Muster's deterministic core (project detection, role-to-provider resolution, artifact gate scoring, dependency-ordered wave planning) wrapped as a local MCP server for Claude Cowork. The router runs as plain Node and makes no model calls; Claude calls these tools to decide who does the work, then does the judgment work itself. Principles, routing policy, and an execution protocol are injected via the server's MCP instructions. Note: the server spawns the muster CLI as a child process, which can be blocked on Windows MSIX installs (virtualized bundle path); verify with scripts/cowork-probe.mjs before relying on it there.

enable_fable.title: Enable Fable tier
enable_fable.description: Route peak-judgment roles to Fable. Off by default; degrades to Opus when disabled.

max_tier.title: Max model tier
max_tier.description: Cap dispatch at 'opus' or 'sonnet' for budget control. Leave empty for no cap.

connectors.title: Declared remote connectors
connectors.description: Comma-separated names of remote connectors to treat as available. Remote connectors cannot be auto-discovered from disk.

tools.name: muster_detect
tools.description: Detect the project profile for a directory.

tools.name: muster_capabilities
tools.description: Resolve every role to its best-available provider, chain, and model tier.

tools.name: muster_match
tools.description: Rank catalog providers against a free-text task.

tools.name: muster_domain
tools.description: Classify an outcome into a work domain.

tools.name: muster_route
tools.description: Route an outcome to its domain + pipeline.

tools.name: muster_pipeline
tools.description: Load a pipeline definition by domain or id.

tools.name: muster_assess
tools.description: Gap-check an outcome before running.

tools.name: muster_steer
tools.description: Classify a mid-run steer message.

tools.name: muster_diagnose
tools.description: Classify a failure symptom and build a diagnose manifest.

tools.name: muster_audit
tools.description: Build the whole-codebase audit manifest.

tools.name: muster_manifest_validate
tools.description: Validate a crew manifest's shape and dependency graph.

tools.name: muster_wave
tools.description: Compute dependency-ordered execution waves.

tools.name: muster_sprint_waves
tools.description: Computes dependency-ordered execution waves from a backlog file's {id}/{deps} annotations (returns waves JSON; annotated:false means the backlog is unannotated/sequential).

tools.name: muster_sprint_protocol
tools.description: Returns the Cowork-adapted sprint orchestration playbook: backlog resolution, sprint-waves, sequential wave execution, claim/receipt discipline, honest disposition defaults, and what Cowork lacks vs the Claude Code plugin.

tools.name: muster_next
tools.description: Single-agent driver: next runnable task given completed ids.

tools.name: muster_score
tools.description: Score an artifact against a gate.

tools.name: muster_prioritize
tools.description: Rank backlog items by RICE/ICE/WSJF/weighted.

tools.name: muster_pick
tools.description: Pick the tournament winner from scored candidates.

tools.name: muster_tally
tools.description: Tally adversarial review verdicts into a gate decision.

tools.name: muster_advise
tools.description: Validate an advice-request and resolve the advisor model (fable->opus). Deterministic, no LLM.

tools.name: muster_fuse
tools.description: Fusion decision engine: validate the debate map, apply the agreement gate, select top-K for synthesis (mode fuse) or fall back to the single best (mode fallback). Deterministic, no LLM.

tools.name: muster_capabilities_roles
tools.description: Resolve every role the same way muster_capabilities does, but return only the {roles} map (lighter capture).

tools.name: muster_match_skills
tools.description: Rank the live skills inventory against a free-text task, plus stack-derived suggested skills.

tools.name: muster_gate_cadence
tools.description: Compute review-gate cadence (spec-gate rounds, batched review-gate passes, reviewer count) from a manifest's waves.

tools.name: muster_receipt_verify
tools.description: Verify a base-SHA is a real, resolvable git commit object in an explicit repo.

tools.name: muster_scope
tools.description: Deterministic backlog-vs-item scope detection for the plan/go verb family.

tools.name: muster_fast_path
tools.description: Score an outcome for the pre-router fast path; with capabilities, also emits the minimal builder+reviewer manifest.

tools.name: muster_plan_checklist
tools.description: Render a crew manifest's plan array as a markdown checklist.
